item.title: evidentlyai / evidently
item.description: 💻 Trending on GitHub — Evidently is ​​an open-source ML and LLM observability framework. Evaluate, test, and monitor any AI-powered system or data pipeline. From tabular data to Gen AI. 100+ metrics.
